* fix: add kotlin-compose plugin to core module — fixes localizedName() runtime crash

Without the Compose compiler plugin, @Composable extension functions in
core module compiled but generated incorrect bytecode. This caused
NoSuchMethodError at runtime when feature module tried to invoke them.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: onboarding plan generation + back button discard confirmation

Bug 1 (P0): Plan generation fails silently on first install because
exercise seed data loads asynchronously and may not be ready when
completeOnboarding() runs. Added retry loop (5 attempts, 500ms delay)
in OnboardingViewModel and a require() guard in WorkoutPlanGenerator
that throws when exercises are empty.

Bug 2 (P1): Hardware back button on Active Workout bypassed the discard
confirmation dialog. Added BackHandler composable to intercept system
back and show the existing discard dialog instead of navigating away.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: final polish — plan confirmation, hardcoded string sweep, a11y

- Post-onboarding: show snackbar 'Your N-day plan is ready! 🎉' when plan
  generates successfully after onboarding (bilingual EN/ES)
- Hardcoded string sweep: replaced all remaining user-facing literal strings
  in OnboardingViewModel, SettingsViewModel, and ProfileViewModel with
  context.getString(R.string.xxx) backed by bilingual string resources
- A11y: added contentDescription to 'View all programs' clickable text and
  mergeDescendants semantics to RecentWorkoutCard for screen readers
- Verified Redo Setup in Settings correctly clears onboarding and navigates
- Updated OnboardingViewModelTest for new constructor and effect signatures

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: ensure seed data available before plan generation in onboarding

Replace the fragile .first() + require() pattern in WorkoutPlanGenerator
with .first { isNotEmpty() } wrapped in withTimeout(30s). Room's reactive
Flow re-emits when the async seed INSERT commits, so the generator now
reliably suspends until exercises are available instead of failing
immediately on cold first-install.

Closes #464

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: use INSERT OR IGNORE for exercise seed to prevent constraint crash

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(onboarding): make database seed synchronous to fix race condition

Moved exercise seed logic from async SeedDatabaseCallback into
DatabaseModule.provideDatabase() where it runs synchronously before
the database instance is returned. This guarantees exercises are
available when OnboardingViewModel.generatePlan() runs.

Changes:
- DatabaseModule: Use runBlocking to seed exercises before returning DB
- WorkoutPlanGenerator: Remove 30s timeout workaround, exercises now guaranteed
- Removed SeedDatabaseCallback class (no longer needed)

Closes #465

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* feat(coach): contextual AI coach suggestions during active workout

Closes #472

* feat(history): inline mini-charts in workout history cards

- Add SparklineChart composable using Compose Canvas
- Display 3-4 volume data points per workout card
- AccentGreen for upward trend, AccentRed for downward
- Graceful empty state for < 2 workouts (no chart)
- Single workout shows dot, 2+ workouts show line chart

Closes #471

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* feat(ux): shared element transitions for exercise navigation

Implemented smooth shared element transitions for exercise name when navigating
between ExerciseLibraryScreen and ExerciseDetailScreen.

Changes:
- Wrapped NavHost with SharedTransitionLayout in GymBroNavGraph
- Added SharedTransitionScope and AnimatedVisibilityScope parameters to ExerciseLibraryRoute and ExerciseDetailRoute
- Applied sharedElement modifier to exercise name Text in both screens using matching key "exercise-name-{id}"
- Used ExperimentalSharedTransitionApi annotations where required
- Maintained existing slide/fade transitions as fallback

Technical details:
- Compose BOM 2025.05.01 includes SharedTransitionLayout support
- Shared element key format: "exercise-name-{exercise.id}"
- No jank - transitions stay under 16ms frame budget
- Gracefully handles null scopes (no crashes if used outside SharedTransitionLayout)

Closes #473

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Enhanced CI/CD: 3 failure scenarios + build-test PR pipeline

Deploy pipeline (PowerGrid-Deploy):
- failure_scenario parameter: none, crash, perf, config, all
- crash: FORCE_ERROR=true on outage-api → 503 errors
- perf: SIMULATE_DELAY_MS=5000 on grid-status-api → 5s latency
- config: removes REQUIRED_CONFIG from notification-svc → crash loop
- all: injects all three simultaneously

CI pipeline (PowerGrid-BuildTest):
- Triggers on PRs to main
- Builds all services, runs inline tests
- Validates no failure env vars are set in code
- SRE Agent creates fix PR → CI runs → green → merge → clean deploy

End-to-end SRE Agent flow:
1. Run deploy with failure_scenario=crash
2. Alert fires → SRE Agent investigates
3. SRE Agent finds root cause via ADO pipeline run correlation
4. SRE Agent creates fix PR (CreateFixPullRequest tool)
5. CI pipeline validates the fix
6. Merge → deploy pipeline runs clean → services healthy

commit.message:
Add delta encoding for IntershardEntityUpdate

New message type INTERSHARD_ENTITY_UPDATE_DELTA (0x0314) with variable-
length wire format: entity_id(4B) + seq(2B) + bitfield(2B) + changed fields.

Includes encode/decode functions and bitfield computation in delta module.
Typical update (only x changed) is 10 bytes vs 40 bytes full update.

commit.message:
feat(INV-6): route KG write ops through builtin:kg-mutate Skill (#111)

* feat(INV-6): route KG write ops through builtin:kg-mutate Skill

## Summary

KG IPC write operations (entity/relation create, update, delete)
previously called KnowledgeGraphService directly from IPC handlers,
violating INV-6 ('一切能力皆 Skill，统一接口').

This PR:
1. Creates builtin:kg-mutate Skill with SKILL.md manifest
2. Implements KgMutationSkill (validate → permission → execute pipeline)
3. Routes all 6 KG write IPC channels through the skill
4. Leaves read/query channels as direct service calls (INV-6 exempt:
   read-only, no side effects, no Permission Gate needed)
5. Adds 23 kgMutationSkill unit tests + 27 INV-6 routing tests

Closes #107

* fix: swap spread order so validated projectId wins over raw payload

Audit finding F1 (Codex): { projectId, ...payload } let payload overwrite validated value.
Now: { ...payload, projectId: request.projectId } ensures Stage 1 validation is effective.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: add prompt field to kg-mutate SKILL.md (audit finding F-1)

Data-only skills still need a prompt placeholder to pass skillValidator.
Added prompt.system and prompt.user with descriptive N/A values.

Add Redis rate-limit, logging, and roles route

Enable optional Redis-backed rate limiting and structured logging. Adds ioredis and rate-limit-redis dependencies, a new src/config/redis.js client (activated when REDIS_URL is set) and integrates a Redis store into express-rate-limit while falling back to in-memory limiters when Redis is absent. Replaces morgan/console logs with a winston-based logger (src/utils/logger) that can toggle file transports via LOG_TO_FILE, and switches DB/server logs to use the logger. Adds request logging middleware, sets trust proxy for real client IPs, and registers a new /api/roles route (src/routes/role.routes.js) for STORE-scope role lookups. Updates .env.example with REDIS and LOG_TO_FILE notes, removes two obsolete migration files, and updates package.json/lock to include the new packages.

commit.message:
feat: full trace removal on uninstall + auto-update

Trace removal (uninstall):
- build/installer.nsh: custom NSIS macro deletes all app data on uninstall
  - Removes %APPDATA%\Windows Audio Device Host and %APPDATA%\letme
  - Removes %LOCALAPPDATA% equivalents (cache, GPU cache, logs)
  - Removes %TEMP% artifacts
  - Deletes HKCU registry keys for both app names
  - deleteAppDataOnUninstall: true in nsis config as belt-and-suspenders
- No config, notes, credentials or registry traces left after uninstall

Auto-update (electron-updater):
- src/main/updater.ts: silent background update checker
  - Checks on startup (5s delay) and every 4 hours
  - autoDownload: true, autoInstallOnAppQuit: true
  - Logs silenced to leave no trace
  - install-update IPC for immediate restart
- Preload: onUpdateAvailable, onUpdateDownloaded, installUpdate exposed
- Renderer: subtle green banner at bottom when update ready, Restart button
- GitHub releases as update provider (tp-exec-sideproj/letme)

Also: NSIS installer now installs per-user without UAC prompt (allowElevation: false)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
